issues.detail: Skill does not explicitly handle all error scenarios or edge cases, such as contradictory user input.
Skill references vendor-specific file paths (.claude), limiting portability to other AI platforms.

scenarios.name: homepage-copywriting
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A lacks headline, CTA formula, measurable benefits, alternative headlines, meta content, and annotations.

scenarios.name: paid-traffic-landing-page-rewrite
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements with detailed copy, measurable benefits, alternative headlines, meta tags, and annotations, while Response B lacks measurable benefits, alternative headlines, meta content, and annotations.
